title: Jira Product Discovery AI adds in-product summarization and drafting
claim: Atlassian Intelligence in Jira Product Discovery focuses on summarizing and generating content inside ideas, comments, and pages, reinforcing discovery work inside the broader Atlassian operating system.
source_snippet: Generate new content and summarize content in idea descriptions and comments.
implication: ProductOS needs stronger multi-source synthesis and traceability than embedded drafting assistance alone if it wants to stand above connected PM workflow tools.
followup_questions: How often do PMs need workflow continuity outside the Atlassian footprint?
